creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 200374
v1

Hi there

KDE4 will be removed by the end of this year.

I would like to move games/knights-kde4 to  games/knights and upgrade it to 18.12.0 (i.e. ${KDE_APPLICATIONS_VERSIONS}).

As it then is a part of the KDE Applications I would like kde@ to be the maintainer too, as they share the version via kde.mk.

Are you fine with this?


mfg Tobias
